untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Order book depth depletion monitoring (>40% of typical depth) — no order book depth indicator available; (2) Bid-ask spread percentile calculation (>60th percentile of recent spreads) — no spread percentile rank indicator available; (3) One-sided volume detection — vol_ratio_20 is symmetric and cannot distinguish directional imbalance. The core microstructure conditions (order book exhaustion, spread widening by percentile rank) cannot be expressed with the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using price_pos_20 (price deviation from 20-day MA in standard deviations), bb_bandwidth (as proxy for spread widening), and vol_ratio_20 (for volume elevation). However, critical microstructure components—order book depth depletion and bid-ask spread percentile rank—are not available in the indicator set. A complete translation would require order book depth, bid-ask spread time series, and percentile rank functions.
